title: Molten Marinated Brazilian Egg Plant Skewers
description: A garlicky and flavorful post-workout Brazilian dish featuring marinated egg plants, this recipe is perfect for a satvik-friendly meal. It is a great option for those looking for a healthy and tasty dish.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, lime juice, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the egg plant cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated egg plant cubes onto the bamboo skewers.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the egg plants are tender and lightly charred.
Brush the skewers with additional olive oil if needed.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as quinoa or grilled vegetables.
